=== FORM 283 SPATIAL EXTRACTION ===

These values are pre-computed from Azure DI word coordinates.
Each field was extracted by collecting all words whose centre
falls inside a calibrated bounding-box region for that field.
Checkboxes are resolved from polygon-based selection marks.
They are authoritative — use them verbatim and do NOT
re-derive from the form body.

-- Dates (DDMMYYYY, extracted from fixed coordinate regions) --
formReceiptDateAtClinic: 30061999  (day=30  month=06  year=1999)
formFillingDate:         20051999  (day=20  month=05  year=1999)
dateOfInjury:            14041999  (day=14  month=04  year=1999)
dateOfBirth:             03031974  (day=03  month=03  year=1974)

-- Identifiers & phones --
idNumber:                0334521567
mobilePhone:             8502451645
landlinePhone:           0975423541

-- Selected checkboxes (from Azure DI selection marks + coordinate region lookup) --
  [SELECTED] at (7.08, 3.98)  →  label: זכר
  [SELECTED] at (6.78, 6.45)  →  label: במפעל
  [SELECTED] at (7.36, 9.89)  →  label: הנפגע חבר בקופת חולים

gender (resolved):           זכר
accidentLocation (resolved): במפעל
healthFundMember (resolved): (none — no fund checkbox selected)

-- Free-text fields (extracted from fixed coordinate regions) --
lastName:            יוחננוף
firstName:           רועי
street:              המאיר
poBox:
houseNumber:         15
entrance:            1
apartment:           16
city:                אלוני הבשן
postalCode:          445412
jobType:             ירקנייה
timeOfInjury:        15:30
accidentAddress:     לוונברג 173 כפר סבא
accidentDescription: במהלך העבודה הרמתי משקל כבד וכתוצאה מכך הייתי צריך ניתוח קילה
injuredBodyPart:     קילה
